(Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to Dougalas A. Applegate, Esq., off calendar/good Cause in Response to OSC. MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Douglas A. Applegate, Esq., and Gigi Ellis, and Thomas C. Carlson, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Counsel and Parties in Propria Persona sanctioned $100.00, each for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/19/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212).

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2004 Advanced From Jun-02-04 To Jun-02-04 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Department 611, Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber: c/c for settlement conference, James Milar appearing for plaintiff, Douglas Applegate appearing for defendants, parties are also present in court. Case settles on the record. Plaintiff to receive $25,000.00 with the first payment of $13,700.00 due within 30 days. The balance is due with 60 days or after other terms are met. (See the reporter's transcript for specific details.) Parties for both sides state on the record that they understand and accept the terms of the agreement as stated on the record. Case will be set on the CRC calendar and removed from the master calendar.
